---
name: 🛠️ Program Resource or Task Request
about: Standard form for engineering teams to request program migration resources or log tactical tasks.
title: '[Task] '
labels: ['backlog', 'triage']
---

### 📋 Request Overview
Provide a clear, high-level summary of the resource or task required for the migration.

### ⚙️ Technical Requirements & Scope
- [ ] Detail the explicit engineering work required.
- [ ] List any known tool or infrastructure dependencies.

### 📊 Business Value / Impact
Why is this task critical to the current migration phase? What does it unblock?

### ✅ Acceptance Criteria
What specific conditions must be met for this request to be considered complete?
